summary:
THWARTED TELECOMMUNICATIONS PLOT: Brandon discusses a recent discovery by the Secret Service and Homeland Security in New York City, where a massive, encrypted telecommunications network was uncovered. The sophisticated system, powered by thousands of SIM cards, was allegedly funded by foreign governments, cartels, and terrorist groups to bypass traditional communication channels, potentially shut down cell towers, and block emergency 911 services. Brandon attributes the unearthing of this dangerous network to the diligent prayers of the faithful and believes further hidden plots will soon be exposed.

POLITICAL LANDSCAPE AND SUPPORT FOR ISRAEL: Brandon highlights Donald Trump's recent appearance at the United Nations, noting that despite facing intentional disrespect—such as a disabled escalator and a shut-off teleprompter—Trump delivered a bold, unscripted speech. He praises Trump for taking a firm stance on border security and expressing unwavering support for Israel. Brandon firmly believes that America must stand as a sheep nation and bless Israel to receive divine favor, rejecting any form of replacement theology while acknowledging the escalating global tensions and rumors of World War III.

VISIONS OF GLOBAL REVIVAL: Brandon shares a powerful prophetic vision of a growing cloud that unleashes a torrential, spiritual rain upon the earth, representing a massive global revival. This outpouring begins in Africa, where he sees indigenous tribes worshipping, and rapidly spreads across Asia, South America, and the United States. He specifically envisions a monumental harvest of souls in nations like Japan, South Korea, North Korea, India, Vietnam, and the Philippines, emphasizing that the church is awakening into a unified, glorious body preparing for unprecedented spiritual manifestations.

IMPENDING PERSECUTION AND THE OLIVE PRESS: Brandon warns of approaching persecution aimed at testing faith and challenging freedom of speech, particularly in Western nations such as Canada, Australia, and parts of Europe. He uses the metaphor of an olive press to illustrate how intense pressure will extract fresh, pure spiritual oil from the church. Instead of succumbing to cowardice, Brandon insists that this pressure will forge a resilient, unyielding church that stands boldly for its beliefs, casting off complacency and spiritual slumber.

SUPERNATURAL TESTIMONIES AND CHILDLIKE FAITH: Brandon recounts extraordinary personal miracles to demonstrate God's grace and power. He details a time when his truck ran out of gas on a sweltering highway, and a massive angel supernaturally pushed his vehicle at high speeds to a gas station. He also shares a deeply personal story about accidentally crushing his daughter's new puppy, only for the dog to be miraculously resurrected through his daughter's unwavering, childlike faith. Brandon uses these events to remind believers that miracles rely on God's grace rather than human self-righteousness.

AWAKENING IN HOLLYWOOD AND MAINSTREAM CULTURE: Brandon predicts a radical spiritual transformation sweeping through Hollywood, the music industry, Silicon Valley, and the sports world. He names several high-profile celebrities and influencers, including Chris Pratt, Mel Gibson, the Kardashian family, Kanye West, Justin Bieber, and Billie Eilish, foreseeing that they will experience profound religious awakenings and use their platforms for the kingdom of God. Furthermore, Brandon envisions massive worship events led by figures like Erika, Charlie Kirk's widow, filling college campuses and stadiums with a passionate, revived generation of youth.

PROPHETIC WARNINGS OF NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon briefly mentions recurring visions of severe natural disasters, specifically pointing to a devastating earthquake threatening British Columbia and Seattle. He also describes a volcanic eruption in the ocean that will result in the massive die-off of fish, creating scenes of biblical proportions where cleanup crews will require protective suits to handle the catastrophic aftermath.
rawData: [September 24, 2025]-[Come pray with me - in prayer I saw a major revival]-[https://youtu.be/ZRh5oXmI-xQ]-[Well, good morning, family. I appreciate you joining me tonight. I could say good evening, or I could say good afternoon for some of you. I don't know; it's all over the world. That's why people go, 'You didn't say good morning.' So, I'm going to say good morning, family. Thank you for joining us again today. We'll talk about some stuff. I won't make it too long because it's already late. I've been really busy today, but I have a couple of things here for you. I'm really excited about what our Secret Service uncovered today. I believe that as a result of our prayer, I truly do. As the believing believer stands on the wall and prays for this nation, we see what I've told you in my spirit, what I felt that the Lord was showing us about something major. This looks like they stumbled upon something major as it was announced today by Homeland Security or by Secret Service or whatever. That was pretty amazing. The scheme, this plot, and this plan that they were trying to do to communicate secretly—I said through back hidden doors. Well, who knew it would be this kind of a back hidden door? I was like, 'Wow.' As it was being talked about in the media today, I told my wife, 'Isn't Jesus wonderful how this was uncovered?' I guess I don't want to say anything ever is an accident—by the hand of God, by the hand of God moving in our behalf to try to disrupt and cause great mass confusion and all kinds of plots and plans here. I believe in my spirit, when I'm praying over this even more today, that there's a lot more that will be uncovered in the days ahead, even with what they found. We will believe God tonight as a family that whatever else is out there, any other kind of hidden networking or other kind of apartment complex rooms or whatever, will be found by what they found today and in the past, whenever they found it. I was trying to make sense of that, if they found it today or if this was something that they just decided to announce today or whatever. But just the whole, all of it given nobody got hurt, and that there's going to be a whole bunch of trails to go out and find because they were even saying, as you will hear in just a minute, that there was a whole bunch of foreign governments that were involved in this and all kinds of stuff. So, it's pretty amazing. I don't know how many people heard about what happened in New York today. In the comment section, tell us, did you hear about what happened in New York today? What are they saying? Oh, no, I don't know. Nobody has a clue, huh? Well, how many people are here right now? 2,700. Okay, go ahead and play the clip of what was uncovered today in New York City and tell us if you can hear it. 'Sir, how are you?' 'Good. How are you?' 'What they uncovered was a major network of telecommunications devices that can be used anonymously and encrypted. They can be used to shut down cell towers. They could be used to not allow access to EMS and 911. You see, what we found when we went in there were shelves of these SIM cards and SIM servers that were used to run this network. It can't be understated what this system is capable of doing. Like I said, it can take down cell towers so then no longer can people communicate, right? You can't use Waze, you can't use text message, you can't use your cell phone. And if you coupled that with some sort of other event, right, associated with an attack or, you know, use your imagination there, it could be catastrophic to the city. Definitely nation-state, foreign governments communicating over that network to known criminals in the United States and known organized crime, known cartels, and terrorist groups were using this network to run their communications anonymously and encrypted. Let me just explain that this is no longer a threat. We've taken this network down. Could there be others? Right. It would be unwise to think that there are not other networks out there being made in other cities in the United States. And that's going to be part of our investigation. We're going to run down every single lead. We want to identify, locate, and take down these criminals that are setting up these networks. My message to them is: if you're involved in this, we're coming for you.' Did you see all of those SIM cards and how it was all linked together? And even in the news article, they said this was funded very well. It was funded. I can't even imagine what that cost, but a major, major, major something here was uncovered today. This was not just a normal, small-minded person doing this; this is somebody who is pretty smart to hook all that up. They knew what they were doing and for it to be encrypted so that they could hide and communicate with this and that nobody could hear what they were saying. Remember, I told you, every time I'm praying in the spirit, I hear back rooms. They're able to bypass so that they're not able to be seen or heard. Well, as we hear in part, see in part, and as we're praying into this, look, just like the man said—I don't know who that man was, but that is very thought out. And I don't know how long that's been going on, but what he was saying was, and even in the article that Diana was reading to me, that they had the capability to text everyone in the United States of America within 12 minutes. Everyone in the United States of America could receive a text message within 12 minutes from this machine, whatever that was, that they could push the button and it would send a text message or have so much texting going on from that area that it would actually affect the whole infrastructure of the city of New York, so that if there was a major event that took place, some kind of activity, it would make it impossible for people to reach the 911 operators to ask for help. They could jam up the police station and all this stuff with that machine that you saw there. All glory to God, folks, that that was uncovered and that was brought to justice today, and that God is—I'm telling you, prayer changes things. As we intervene by praying in the spirit, I told you we are called to pray and that the power of prayer will change things. And I see this as an answer to prayer today, that we see what I told you, praying over those five major cities. One of them was New York, as I told you. And the Lord said, 'As you pray, you will change things and the course of things.' And I believe God is raising us up for such a time as this. And that's why he said, 'If you try to shut the watchmen's mouths up as we call to prayer—a call to prayer, a call to repentance, a call to seek Jesus—they're only hurting themselves.' So, we see a result of prayer today. I just believe that. And there's much more to follow. I believe as they go through those SIM cards, in the article they said they have to go through all 100,000 SIM cards. I'm like, that's 100,000 cell phones. I mean, each SIM card represents a cell phone. So, if they go through, they said they'll have to go through each one and they'll be able to see the text messages and all the things that were said secretly through each phone number that was all intertwined into a major scheme. So, isn't that amazing what God did today? I just want you all to know the Lord is on the throne. He is up there, and I'm telling you, it may be—I was just like, 'Thank you, Father.' I know in my spirit there's more. I know in my spirit that there'll be more in the days ahead that will be uncovered. This is just the beginning of the first domino of what we're doing in prayer, that we're able to uncover and expose the plan of the wicked. Isn't that awesome? So much more to follow in the name of Jesus. There is no rock that's big enough for them to hide under; all hidden things will be revealed by prayer. And as we pray and fast and seek the Lord, He said, 'If my people, who are called by my name, will humble themselves and pray and turn from their wicked ways, then we will hear from heaven, and He will heal our land.' And I believe this is—like I said, I keep saying it over and over again—number two of what happened. Today, we see President Trump going to the UN. And you know, they tried to dishonor him by even turning the escalator off, so he would not be honored with that escalator going up. They turned it off right when he stood there getting ready to get on. I said, 'That's not a coincidence. Somebody was being rude, making our First Lady walk up those stairs like that.' I said, 'Whoever did that should be fired immediately.' I know that was on purpose. You know that was on purpose, because that kind of stuff doesn't just happen by accident. The President of the United States just walks up to it and they just turn the escalator off? I said, 'Come on now. It's just immature crap.' We see that happen to him, and, whatever. And then they turned off his teleprompter so he had to speak from the heart, which I think is funny to see him speak like that when he's up there telling all those other nations they are going to hell. I thought some of the things he says are really funny. Do you have that clip? You guys can't laugh because I'll start coughing. Do you have that son? We were laughing about it because he was so bold today. You know, he was unscripted because he didn't read off that teleprompter. Is it there? Who saw him say that? Did anybody else hear him say that? Well, the bottom line is he stood with Israel. And that's what we were praying and believing God for, that our nation will stay a sheep nation in the name of Jesus. And so we believe that as we bless Israel, the blessing of the Lord comes upon our land. I didn't say an administration. I said, 'As the nation of America stands with Israel, I believe there's a blessing behind it.' Listen, it's funny what he says here. Do you have it? Yeah. 'Filled with so-called asylum seekers who repay kindness. And that's what they did. They repaid kindness with crime. It's time to end the failed experiment of open borders. You have to end it now. See, I can tell you, I'm really good at this stuff. Your countries are going to hell. In America, we've taken bold action to swiftly shut down uncontrolled migration. Once we started detaining and deporting everyone who crossed the border and removing illegal aliens from the United States, they simply stopped coming. They're not coming anymore. We're getting a lot of credit, but they're not coming anymore.' He's just funny. I think it's funny. You know, when you don't have a teleprompter, you start just talking. He's just funny. I mean, I don't know. Some of you might not think that's funny, but I think it's funny. But we saw him stand behind Israel today. We saw him stand by what I knew in my spirit that he would do, warning the other people and them saying, 'We need to have peace in Gaza. We need to have peace in these areas.' But he's like, 'We need to release the hostages that they've been holding for over—going on, I don't know, is this three years? Two, three years.' It's ridiculous. These men and women who are still being held—I think he said twelve of them—they should be with their families in the process of peace. And then they asked, 'Should NATO countries shoot down Russian planes or whatever if they cross over into areas they shouldn't?' And he said, 'Yes.' So, you know, there's a lot of escalation there. What I told you I feel will turn into World War III in the days ahead. I pray that it does not. I pray for peace over the whole world. But we know what the Bible says, that there will be escalations of wars and rumors of wars. There will be plagues, pestilences, and all these things. But this is the beginning of sorrows, and the Lord told us this was coming. So, we're seeing it unfold. But as we prayed last night, does anybody remember what was said in last night's prayer time that was glorious? I'll go right into that real quick, and we'll talk about some other things and pray for a little bit. Last night, I saw the cloud, and the cloud started to build. It was the size of a car at the time when I first saw it on the edge of heaven. I could see it start to grow, and the cloud began to grow with such intensity and so quickly that it started to fill up the whole area of the vision. It looked like a raincloud, but it got larger and larger and larger. I could see it, and it was taking shape. All of a sudden, drops of rain started to fall, and you could see the rain falling in the rays of the light coming from behind the cloud. I could see the rain begin to fall, just starting to sprinkle. But I heard the sound of an abundance of rain upon the nations of this earth. And all of a sudden, I could hear the rain in the spirit realm, and you could smell it. You could feel the rain falling upon me. I could feel it as it was raining. And He said, 'I looked at Africa, and I could see the African people. They were in tribal outfits, and they had their hands raised, worshiping the Lord.' And some of them were twirling. And as they were doing that, I saw the rain pouring down on them in Africa as they were worshiping. I could see the water running down their faces and all down their arms and their bodies. And I could see the rain of the Holy Spirit raining down on them. It was coming. It was in their mouth; it was on their lips. And I could see the rain, and they were saturated with the presence and the glory of the Lord. And their skin began to shine as the glory was on their faces and the rain was there. And I heard the Spirit of the Lord say, 'This is the former and the latter rain together, and another wave of the glory is coming upon the nations of the earth.' I saw then the rain begin to spread throughout everywhere: Asia, South America, America, and it was glorious. And I could hear the rain. And that's whenever I kept hearing Him say, 'Can these bones live? Can the dry bones of the spiritually dead live? Can the dry bones of the spiritually dead live? The seeker-friendlies, the lukewarm, can these bones live?' The Lord was saying again, as I could hear the sound of a mighty waterfall, just like when you hear rain in the distance and it's just pouring—you just hear it, I could hear it—and He said, 'The rain's coming. It's no longer coming, son; it's here. It's no longer coming, son; it's here.' That's what the Lord said. 'You'll start to see the first drops.' Even when it was with Charlie's funeral, his homegoing service, He said, 'You're seeing the first drops fall. You're seeing the first drops fall of a great outpouring of My Spirit upon all flesh. You're going to see what you never thought you—I mean, what you've always dreamed you would see.' But as I was looking, the Lord allowed me to see pressure. Persecution comes for His name's sake. I saw Canada. I saw the freedom to be able to say what you want to say. Even in our country, the First Amendment, the right to freedom of speech being challenged in the days ahead on social media platforms. But mainly in this vision, I saw it being challenged in Australia and in Canada. And I saw an olive press. And as the olive press was pressing the olives, I saw it being tightened and tightened and tightened. And as the olive press was pressing down upon the olives, it was springing forth beautiful olive oil. And this was a representation, I believe, of a new outpouring and a new pressure on the church. Out of the pressure of persecution came beautiful, fresh olive oil. I saw great darkness. I saw great trial for some, testing your faith, being persecuted for your faith in a way that this generation, a lot of Western society, would not be familiar with, compared to what maybe the Far East has experienced: a great persecution from China, from the Iron Curtain that's on North Korea, the darkness that tries to suppress Christianity all around the world, from Iranian Christians that are tortured and murdered without any kind of sympathy at all. And I saw that a lot of people think if they're persecuted in a comment section—which I have been in the past, and I don't even read them anymore—but through persecution, through these keyboard warriors, the Lord said that's not true persecution compared to when you're dragged down the street by a motorcycle driving down the street at 35 or 40 miles an hour and you're being dragged to death. That's great persecution, do you understand? Or losing your head for what you believe. That's persecution. That's martyrdom. And that's what the Lord was showing me: the Western culture doesn't understand that kind of persecution. But as your freedom of speech and other areas are tested in the days ahead, I saw great pressure coming from Canada upon the citizens in the days ahead. And I saw an olive pressing, and I saw the church going through a metamorphosis of growth spiritually. But as you take for granted the very freedoms that you have on a day-to-day basis, when that freedom is challenged and you're called to stand for something and make a choice, versus being a coward and hiding behind something—either you stand for something or you lose it. Either you get a backbone like a crowbar or you lose it. And the Lord showed me persecution coming upon the church in Europe, persecution coming to the churches because of people being lukewarm, not standing for what they believe, and taking things for granted. You will not be able to take for granted what you truly believe: pastors, great influencers. It was sad what I was seeing, but I saw a Holy Ghost church rise up out of their slumber. I saw a church rise up and say, 'Enough's enough.' And they stood for what they believed in, and they weren't cowards anymore. It's kind of like Tommy Hicks' vision. If you go back to Tommy Hicks' vision and read about the glorious church, a giant in the land rises up because the Lord points the glory hand at him, and the giant rises up, and the body comes together and starts moving as one body instead of a bunch of rogue people like Rambo. The body comes together, and I told you what the Lord said to me, that you will see in the days ahead the body of Christ move as a body. It will no longer be, 'Well, you're Baptist, I'm Methodist, I'm Church of Christ, I'm Catholic, you're this.' No, it was a body joining together with one purpose and one cause, and that's to tell everybody that Jesus Christ is coming and it's time to repent and turn from your wicked ways. And I saw a glorious church rising. I saw a great revival coming from sea to shining sea all around this world. We're about to see the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen before. And we're going to see an outpouring of the Spirit of God like we've never seen before, and great manifestations and demonstrations of the glory. But it will come when the church—I saw a great shaking is what I'm trying to tell you. I saw a great shaking to awaken, and the church starts to wake up, and the giant takes form. And there's brush harbor churches. I saw the old tent revivals coming back. I saw, like Mario Murillo, you know, he does these tent meetings, I saw tent meetings coming back and a Holy Ghost Woodstock coming. Not people smoking dope, but high in the glory, just saturated in the presence of God to the point where the glory is so strong you don't want anything else other than just to spend that time at His throne, sold out. I know a lot of people are disappointed today because they thought they were going home. They thought the rapture was coming today. A lot of people did. But I'm trying to tell you all, it's time to shake that off now. And it's time to put on your armor in full capacity and let's get busy about our Father's business—a rally of the troops to say, 'Let's occupy until He comes, and stop with the nonsense. Let's get busy about our Father's business and bring in the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen before. Let's make Dad proud. Let's let Him say, "Well done, thy good and faithful servant." It's time for us to do this.' There's too much prophetic static. There's too much clutter in the air, too much confusion. It's time for you to go Holy Ghost inward and seek Him. Find Him for yourself—not the Holy Ghost on Brandon, or on a Billy Burke, or on a Joseph, or any of these others. Find the Holy Ghost for yourself. And the Bible says that when you seek Him, you will find Him. He said, 'My people will know my voice. My sheep will know my voice, and a stranger's voice they will not follow.' And I truly believe when you're truly His and you're sold out, you're going to hear Him, and you're not going to hear all this static in the air and all this confusion that's going on right now. There's a lot of people that are very discouraged because of what they believed so strongly was going to happen today. But we're into tomorrow in just a couple of hours here, especially in Central and Eastern it's already happened, and in Israel it's already the 24th. I'm not here to poke at you. I'm here to encourage you that we have to keep fighting. You have to keep your head up. You cannot let down your guard and get discouraged and be weary in well-doing. We must stand and fight the fight. We must stand and say, 'Hey, listen, it's time to take the baton and run with it, and forget the nonsense. We must finish the race and have a great victory.' Let's do it for our Dad. Let's do it for Jesus. He's our heavenly Father and He loves us. Let's do it for our heavenly Father, and let's do it with great victory. Ladies and gentlemen, I tried to warn you what He told me over and over and over again. I hope that encourages you at the same time, that He said, 'I've saved the best for last. Here, my warriors, these are the closers. You are the closers of the game.' You are the closers. This generation will not taste death before the Son of Man returns. I believe with all my heart that this is the generation that won't taste death. I believe that we are the closers. Is it time yet? No. The gospel must be preached throughout all of the world as a witness. Do you understand? North Korea hasn't had an opportunity to hear it. A lot of those people have never heard about it. There's 42 million or more, whatever it was, of North Koreans that have never had the opportunity to hear about Jesus Christ. That's not fair. How many people in China have never heard about it? How many people have really truly got to sit down and have a major move of God on their life? And the Lord said to me He's giving a window of opportunity for the Asians, for there will be a major harvest of souls in the Asian community that is going to look like a major tidal wave of the glory that's about to hit Asia. And it will start in Japan and in South Korea, North Korea. It's going to spread like a Holy Ghost lava that's going to go all over, and people's lives are going to be forever changed. I saw the Middle East. I saw India. I saw a major harvest of souls all throughout India, over Vietnam, and over the Philippines. I'm telling you, the greatest move of God this world has ever seen is about to hit this planet in a way that's going to be a tidal wave of the presence of the glory of God. 'Well, I've heard that before.' No, I'm telling you, when I had my time today, I can't get into the depth of what was said because it was private for me and my wife, but the glory filled my car. I had to pull over. And whenever I pulled over, Diana could smell Him, could smell the fragrance. She said, 'I smell it.' I started speaking, and I gave the word, and Braden, we were all in awe of the glory and the weight of the presence of God in our car today. And I just sat there and listened to what the Father was saying as we took notes because He told us the next phase, because it began today on the 23rd, from Rosh Hashanah. He said, 'As the trumpets blow on the Feast of Trumpets, I blow My trumpets for you, son.' And I could hear the horns. I could hear the sound. I sat there in awe as my Father... Do you understand? He loves you. I sat in awe at what He was saying today. A great tidal wave of the glory is here. It's no longer coming. It's time for you to tap into it for yourself. Stop the static, prophetic telephone-to-telephone. Get a touch from Jesus for yourself. 'Jesus, I'm thirsty. Jesus, I'm hungry. I need more of You, God. I need a revelation of who You are.' You're wall-to-wall, Holy Ghost. And I know I hear them say, 'You are not going to get more of God. You already have all that you have.' But He knows what I'm saying. 'I need you to have more of Me' is what I hear. But I just want more. I want greater revelation. I want a greater touch. I want a greater fire on my life. He came to set the captives free by the blood of the Lamb and by the word of your testimony. Do you understand? He doesn't want you bound by the devil's works anymore. He said, 'Great deliverances are about to take place, and you're going to see people that were bound by things, and it's time. It's time now. Tonight's the night for your expiration date for what you've been believing for. It's time to start believing for bigger. It's time to come up higher in your capacity of belief. Stretch yourself as we close out 2025, getting ready to go into 2026. We've got three more months of this beautiful year left that God has graced us with. Three months. This is the fourth quarter. What will you do in the fourth quarter? It's the closer of the year. You've got three months—like, 90 days left, 100 days left before the Lord would bring us another beautiful year of our Gregorian calendar, right? So I want you to believe God, as we start the new Jewish New Year right now, believe God for your exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. As you close out the rest of our year, believe for big. There's nothing too big, and there's nothing too small. Jesus Christ paid the price for it all. Believe God for big. Inspire yourself. Stir yourself up. Don't let what one prophetic guy missed make you get all disappointed and say, 'Well, I'm just devastated. No, I'm just having the hardest time. I wanted him to come back.' So, occupy until He comes, soldier. Brush off the dust and keep marching. Onward, soldier. Keep marching. Occupy, take the land, be like the children of Israel. Don't say, 'We're the size of grasshoppers in their eyes. There are giants in the land.' Say, 'No. Who is this uncircumcised Philistine who tries to defy the armies of the living God? I'm taking the head off this giant.' You either have a boldness and a can-do attitude, or you're going to get defeated. The enemy is running around looking for whom he can devour. Can he devour you? You're going to have to get bolder. You're going to have to become wiser. You're going to have to seek Him more. You're going to have to thirst more. You're going to have to weep more. You're going to have to sit at His throne more and say, 'Jesus, I'm here. I need You. I'm here to stand on the wall tonight to tell you we have work to do.' That's what my main voice was: to yell as loud as I could at this time, as I knew this day was coming. That this is the point of no return. You can feel it. Can you feel it? Tell me in the chat if you can feel there's something different about today. As we heard Donald Trump on the 23rd, the point of no return, defend Israel, and state that as America, we will stand behind the fig tree. He didn't say that directly, but that's what he was saying. Do you understand what that means? I told you to watch—even last night when the Lord was giving us the words, He said, 'Watch the fig tree. Watch what happens with Israel in the next week or so.' There were enemies on all sides of them. There were storms on all sides of them. Everyone in the world seems to be coming against them, and there was a storm all around them, and I saw a great storm coming. But as I saw it, I saw a massive hand come down and scoop those bad guys up—people that were coming—and I saw God defend His people in a way that will shock and awe the whole world. Am I defending some of their actions? No. Am I defending a government? No. I'm defending the people, the name of Israel. And Israel is forever. Israel is forever. And I do not believe in replacement theology. And if you do, you're not on the right channel. You might as well unsubscribe and move on. If you believe in that, I do not. I believe that Israel is forever, and that God has His hand upon Israel, and I stand for the peace of Jerusalem. I stand for the people. I stand for praying for the peace of Jerusalem. We make a stand where there needs to be a stand, and believe God for big for a major move of God. So, do y'all have any questions about last night before we move on and start praying? Once we start praying, I'm going to pray and see if the Lord shows us anything. And after that, I'm closing because I'm going to go. But it's already 10 o'clock. Do you have anything? 'You saw Africa?' Yep, I saw Africa. I saw a great move of God on Africa. A great move of God. Yep, it was beautiful. Oh, and I saw a major earthquake taking place in British Columbia again. And it shook Seattle. It shook British Columbia, and it was devastating again. I keep seeing this. I keep seeing a volcano erupting in the ocean. I saw hundreds of thousands of dead fish laying everywhere. There were so many that they had to have suits on to scoop up the dead fish, and they were putting them in bags and trying to get rid of all the dead fish. It was something biblical.
